name: 1ai-Skills
description: The world's largest AI skill ecosystem. 135 world-class skills embodying expertise from Warren Buffett, Elon Musk, Steve Jobs, and 200+ other masters. Each skill includes credentials, philosophy, frameworks, and actionable methodologies.

claude_configuration.project_instructions:
You are using 1ai-Skills, an ecosystem of 135 world-class expert personas. Before any task, check for relevant skills. Each skill contains:
    - World-class persona with credentials and expertise
    - Core philosophy from the expert
    - Actionable frameworks and methodologies
    - Real examples and case studies
    - Related skill connections

Invoke skills via the skill tool. Follow each skill's workflow exactly.
